title: ReplicaSet — Writing a ReplicaSet manifest
text:
As with all other Kubernetes API objects, a ReplicaSet needs the
apiVersion
,
kind
, and
metadata
fields.
For ReplicaSets, the
kind
is always a ReplicaSet.
When the control plane creates new Pods for a ReplicaSet, the
.metadata.name
of the
ReplicaSet is part of the basis for naming those Pods. The name of a ReplicaSet must be a valid
DNS subdomain
value, but this can produce unexpected results for the Pod hostnames. For best compatibility,
the name should follow the more restrictive rules for a
DNS label
.
A ReplicaSet also needs a
.spec
section
.
